TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Lilang, title = Lilang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lilang} }

S.FORM: = Lilang = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Lilang. 145 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 388 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 76% niqan 294 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 24% niqan 94 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 71%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%, Truku 1%.
S.PHON: = lilaŋ = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ lilaŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, ʦou *%, tɾuku *%.
S.FORM: = Lilang = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Lilang. 145 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 388 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 76% niqan 294 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 24% niqan 94 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 71%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%, Truku 1%.
S.PHON: = lilaŋ = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ lilaŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, ʦou *%, tɾuku *%.
